title: Device(headset) inventory details
scenario: Verify connected headset inventory details (model, serial number, last detected, software version) are displayed correctly after logging in and selecting the device from the inventory list.
steps: Start the Lens app with headset connected
Navigate to Poly Lens Menu > General > Account
Click on a device from the inventory
expected: Connected device details such as device model, serial number, last detected, and software version are visible.
